lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several minor scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows visible signs of wear, including some fading and minor stains on the upholstery. Mechanical components are functional but show age-related wear.
Fair condition.

Experience the perfect blend of reliability and style with this wonderful vehicle! It's in good condition, clearly well-maintained and ready to take you on your next journey. With its dependable performance and well-kept interior, this car is a solid choice for anyone looking for quality and value!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major project. The engine is difficult to start and, once running, suffers from a very rough idle and noticeable power loss. The transmission is also showing signs of significant wear, with delayed engagement and slipping between gears. Visually, the car has extensive exterior rust, several large dents, and the clear coat is peeling across most panels. The interior is heavily worn, with torn seats and several non-functional electronics. This car will require a trailer for transport and substantial mechanical and cosmetic work to become roadworthy again.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear but no major damage. The interior is well-maintained with some signs of normal use. All mechanical systems are in good working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive repairs before it can be considered roadworthy. The body shows significant signs of age, including pervasive rust along the rocker panels and wheel wells, along with several noticeable dents and heavily oxidized paint. Inside, the upholstery is torn in several places, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. Mechanically, the engine runs but suffers from a persistent oil leak and a rough idle, while the suspension feels loose and requires immediate attention. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited for someone looking for a major project or a source of spare parts.

Presenting a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This specimen is maintained in pristine, showroom-grade condition, reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail adheres to the highest standards of automotive excellence. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents the definitive standard in its class.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and feels brand new. I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garaged and spotless. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that fresh car smell! If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3 in museum-quality condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies, producing a linear power band and a metallic 8,000 RPM redline. The VANOS system has been meticulously overhauled, and rod bearings replaced with VAC coated shells for ultimate longevity. Power is transferred via a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a refreshed limited-slip differential. The chassis is structurally reinforced at the subframe mounting points to ensure peak torsional rigidity. Every bushing is factory-fresh, maintaining the telepathic steering feedback and neutral handling balance the M-division is famous for. Finished in a flawless coat of Carbon Black with zero oxidation, this is a turn-key collector's example with a comprehensive service history.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Full service records. No scratches or dents. Flawless interior. Mechanically perfect.

Experience automotive excellence with this pristine, collector-grade vehicle. Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, chips, or swirls. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition, featuring supple, untouched leather and that distinct new-car scent. Mechanically, it is flawless, backed by a comprehensive service portfolio and exceptionally low mileage. Every button, seal, and component functions perfectly. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly 'mint' example that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership floor.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous care. Every component functions with precision, offering an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such impeccable pedigree.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in pristine, showroom-level condition. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior upholstery, reflects a history of meticulous preservation. An investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands unparalleled quality.

Hey there! Honestly, I’m a bit sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—truly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and always garaged. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the crazy dealership markup, this absolute gem is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Offering a concours-level E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 naturally aspirated 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS. This specimen boasts a
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Perfect interior. Full service history included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the standard for a 'mint' pre-owned car. This meticulously maintained masterpiece has been strictly garage-kept and professionally detailed, boasting a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of wear, while every electronic component and driver-assist feature operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a complete, documented service history from authorized dealerships and a drive that is as tight and responsive as the day it was first delivered. With low mileage and a spotless history, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a turn-key vehicle that looks, feels, and performs like new.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, appearing in showroom condition with no discernible wear. Every surface reflects a commitment to meticulous preservation, offering a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, currently held in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and displaying no discernible wear, this unit represents the pinnacle of its class. It offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen of uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty to believe it—it’s in absolutely pristine, showroom-level condition! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it still looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot. If you're looking for perfection without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a masterclass in atmospheric performance, powered by the S54 inline-six engine featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system for optimized torque across the rev range. The high-revving powerplant is mated to a tactile 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec variable M differential lock. Mechanically flawless, it has received comprehensive preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement. The exterior retains its factory luster with zero signs of oxidation or road rash, while the interior remains in showroom condition. This is an investment-grade example of BMW’s most celebrated M-car chassis.
Mint condition. Flawless paint and interior. Low mileage. Clean title. Garage kept. Full service history included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in showroom condition, having been stored in a climate-controlled garage and spared from the elements. The exterior paint retains its deep, original luster with a mirror-like finish, free of any swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the navigation system to the ambient lighting, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a full service history with all maintenance performed exclusively at authorized dealerships. The engine bay is spotless, and the undercarriage reflects the vehicle's pampered life on dry roads. It drives with the tightness and precision of a brand-new machine. This sale includes two original keys, all factory manuals, and a clean title. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this is the finest example currently available.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to meet the most exacting standards of the discerning collector. Every surface reflects a commitment to excellence, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of engineering mastery.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This specimen exhibits uncompromising aesthetic and mechanical integrity, reflective of its pristine, showroom-condition status. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the expectations of the most discerning collector. This is an investment-grade opportunity for those who demand excellence without compromise.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty. It’s in absolute showroom condition—I’ve babied it since day one and it honestly looks like it just rolled off the lot. Not a single scratch or dent to be found! If you're looking for a ride that’s basically perfect, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offered is a showroom-quality 2017 Shelby GT350, a masterclass in naturally aspirated performance. At its heart lies the 5.2L 'Voodoo' V8, utilizing a flat-plane crankshaft to achieve an 8,250 RPM redline and 526 hp. Power is delivered via a Tremec TR-3160 six-speed manual gearbox and a Torsen limited-slip differential with a 3.73 final drive ratio. The chassis features MagneRide magnetic damping for instantaneous response, while braking is governed by six-piston Brembo calipers and cross-drilled rotors. This specimen remains in concours condition, featuring original paint, a pristine undercarriage, and meticulous service records.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' example, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free of any chips, swirls, or imperfections, having been kept strictly in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the carpets have been protected by factory mats since day one. Mechanically, it is flawless, backed by a comprehensive, gap-free service history from authorized technicians. It drives with the precision and tightness of a car fresh off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a meticulously cared-for masterpiece that satisfies even the most discerning collector's standards.

Presented in impeccable, showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every detail, from the flawless upholstery to the precision-tuned mechanical systems, has been maintained to an exacting standard. This is a distinguished acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing short of perfection.
